title: 02 — Architecture
summary: Defines the five-service Railway topology, monorepo layout, inter-service communication protocols, deployment, local dev, and CI for the trenchwars system.
notes: No frontmatter and filename is descriptive rather than SPEC-prefixed, so heuristic signals are weak. Content defines concrete technical contracts (service topology, message envelopes, channel names, HMAC endpoints, deployment config), which lifts it above DOC into SPEC. Not a single decision (not ADR) and not user-facing requirements (not PRD).
